backstory.original: Alyndra Alexandria Garanahil Sarrbarand is known by many names: Lorekeeper of Rime Spiro, Kinscribe of Clan Monkeymouse, Daughter of Oblivion, Fate Changer, Knight of Wonder and Captivation...and apologetic offspring of Avren & Sofieus.
backstory.display: 艾琳朵拉-亚历山大-加拉纳希尔-萨尔巴兰德有很多名字：莱姆-斯皮罗的传说守护者、猴鼠氏族的金斯克、遗忘之女、命运改变者、奇迹与俘虏骑士......阿夫伦与索菲乌斯的后代。

description.original: Alyndra spikes the mind of a random enemy, damaging them and slowing them by 50% for 3 seconds.
description.display: 艾琳朵拉刺激一名随机敌人的心灵，造成伤害并使其在 3 秒内减速 50%。

longDescription.original: Alyndra reaches into the mind of a random enemy, dealing damage and slowing the enemy by 50% for 3 seconds.
longDescription.display: 艾琳朵拉进入一名随机敌人的内心，造成伤害并使其在 3 秒内减速 50%。

description.original: Alyndra buffs the damage and attack speed of the next two Champions to use their ultimate attacks.
description.display: 艾琳朵拉会提高接下来两位使用杀招的勇士的伤害与攻击速度。

longDescription.original: Alyndra buffs the damage and attack speed of the next two Champions to use their ultimate attacks. If a Champion uses their ultimate again before the buff expires, the duration is refreshed.
longDescription.display: 艾琳朵拉会提高接下来两位使用杀招的勇士的伤害与攻击速度。如果勇士在增益消失之前再次使用杀招，则持续时间刷新。

description.desc: When Alyndra is in the formation, all Champions from the Heroes of the Planes affiliation may be used, even if a Patron, Variant, or other restriction would say otherwise.
当艾琳朵拉处于阵型中时，所有来自位面英雄从属组织的勇士都皆可加入，即便赞助者、支线任务或其他限制条件原本不允许如此。
Alyndra increases the damage of adjacent Champions by $amount%.
艾琳朵拉使相邻勇士的伤害提高 $amount%

tipText.original: Alyndra increases the damage of adjacent Champions.
tipText.display: 艾琳朵拉会提高相邻勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Alyndra glances into the future. The next $portent_number unique Champions to use their ultimate abilities gain the Portent buff for $portent_time seconds, which increases their base damage by $amount% and reduces their base attack cooldown by 0.5 sec. If an affected Champion uses their ultimate ability again before the Portent buff expires, their Portent buff duration is refreshed.
艾琳朵拉可窥视未来。接下来使用杀招技能的 $portent_number 位不同勇士将获得“预兆”增益，持续 $portent_time 秒，期间基础伤害提升 $amount%，基本攻击冷却时间缩短 0.5 秒。如果受影响勇士在预兆增益消失之前再次使用杀招技能，则预兆增益的持续时间刷新。
For each Champion in the formation affected by Portent, Alyndra's Circle of Divination is increased by $amount%, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位受到“预兆”影响的勇士，艾琳朵拉的“占卜之环”效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

Griff, Alyndra's owl companion, sits on Alyndra's shoulder and judges enemies as they spawn. They have a $amount% chance to judge normal enemies as unworthy, and a 100% chance to judge bosses as unworthy. For each unworthy normal enemy that spawns, Circle of Divination is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, stacking multiplicatively. If a boss has spawned in the current area, Circle of Divination is increased by an additional $amount___3%. Griff can judge up to $max_stacks___2 normal enemies per area, and the stacks reset when changing areas.

effect_keys.comment: amount is chance to apply to non-boss, otherwise, it's 100

description.desc: 艾琳朵拉的猫头鹰伙伴格里夫蹲在她肩头，在敌人刷新时审判它们。普通敌人有 $amount% 几率被判定为无价值，首领敌人则为 100% 几率。每刷新一名无价值普通敌人，“占卜之环”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。若当前区域刷新一个首领，“占卜之环”的效果额外提升 $amount___3%。格里夫在每个区域最多可审判 $max_stacks___2 个普通敌人，在变更区域时重置堆叠。

effect_keys.comment: amount is chance to apply to non-boss, otherwise, it's 100

tipText.original: Alyndra's owl companion Griff judges enemies as they spawn, increasing the effect of Circle of Divination per judged enemy.
tipText.display: 艾琳朵拉的猫头鹰伙伴格里夫在敌人刷新时进行审判。每审判一名敌人均使占卜之环的效果提升。

description.desc: Portent now applies to the next $portent_number_desc Champions to use their ultimate abilities instead of $original_portent_number_desc, and the effect is increased by $amount___2%.
“预兆”现在会作用于接下来使用杀招技能的 $portent_number_desc 位勇士，而非 $original_portent_number_desc 位，且效果提升 $amount___2%。

specializationDescription.original: Alyndra peers into even more futures, increasing the number of Champions receiving Portent.
specializationDescription.display: 艾琳朵拉展望更远的未来，使更多勇士获得预兆增益。

description.desc: Doubles Griff's chance to judge enemies as unworthy with Brows of Judgement, increases the buff by $amount___2%, and when changing areas, half of the stacks persist.
格里夫使用“审判表情”将敌人判定为无价值的几率加倍，增益效果提升 $amount___2%，且在变更区域时保留一半堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Alyndra focuses on Griff, increasing the effect of their judgement.
specializationDescription.display: 艾琳朵拉专注于强化格里夫，提高它们的审判效果。

description.desc: If Portent is applied to a Champion under the effect of certain Heroes of the Planes Champions' abilities, those effects are increased in power.

conditions.desc: ^^Avren: Mirror Image effects on the Portented Champion is increased by $(amount)%^Freely: Unlucky For Them increased by $(amount___2)% for each Portented Champion affected by Luck of Yondalla (stacking multiplicatively)^Penelope: Chwinga Mask: Tools for the Job Charm increased by $(amount___3)% for each Portented Champion affected by Chwinga Mask (stacking multiplicatively)^Briv: Netherese Steel effects on the Portented Champion is increased by $(amount___6)%^Orkira: Elemental Fire increased by $(amount___8)% for each Portented Champion affected by Lesser Restoration (stacking multiplicatively)^Widdle: Vampiric Gaze effects on the Portented Champion is increased by $(amount___7)%

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Increases the effect of Freely's Unlucky For Them ability by $(amount)%
Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask: Tools for the Job Charm ability by $(amount)%
Increases the effect of Orkira's Elemental Fire ability by $(amount)%

description.desc: 如果对一位勇士使用“预兆”时，该勇士已被某个“位面英雄”勇士的技能所影响，则该技能将提升威力。

conditions.desc: ^^阿夫伦：已经接受“预兆”的勇士，获得的“镜像”技能效果提升 $(amount)%^弗里：每有一位同时接受了“预兆”和“悠达拉好运”的勇士，“他们真倒霉”的技能效果提升 $(amount___2)%^佩内洛普：楚因加面具：每有一位被“楚因加面具”影响的接受“预兆”的勇士，“物尽其用”符咒的效果提升 $(amount___3)%（以乘算方式堆叠）^布里夫：“耐瑟钢”对受“预兆”影响的勇士的效果提高 $(amount___6)%^奥尔基拉：每有一个同时受“预兆”和“次级复原术”影响的勇士，“元素火焰”的效果提高 $(amount___8)%（以乘算方式堆叠）^威德尔：“吸血鬼之视”对受“预兆”影响的勇士的效果提高 $(amount___7)%

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 使弗里的“他们真倒霉”技能的效果提高 $(amount)%
使佩内洛普的“楚因加面具：物尽其用符咒”技能的效果提高 $(amount)%
使奥尔基拉的“元素火焰”技能的效果提高 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Alyndra magnifies the abilities of her favorite companions: Avren, Briv, Freely, Orkira, Penelope, and Widdle.
specializationDescription.display: 艾琳朵拉会增强她最喜爱的伙伴们的技能：阿夫伦、布里夫、弗里、奥尔基拉、佩内洛普和威德尔。

description.original: Knowledge should always be shared.
description.display: 知识就该用来分享。

description.original: Well I am the only responsible one here...
description.display: 这里就只有我一个这么有责任感......

description.original: Something's not right. We should look into it.
description.display: 有点不对劲。必须调查一下。

description.original: What did you do now, Avren?
description.display: 阿夫伦，你这次又闯了什么祸？

description.original: Knowing what's going to happen and being prepared for it are different things.
description.display: 知道会发生什么和做好准备是两码事。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

name.original: A Hero By Any Other Name

description.original: It's the idea of a thing, the heart of intention.
description.display: 它是事物的理念，是意图的核心。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: With friends by your side, you always have a crew.
description.display: 在我身边的朋友就是我的朋友，你永远有队员。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: I see beyond the present moment, into the next, and the next.
description.display: 我能看见现在之后的那一刻，再之后的一刻。

description.original: Perhaps there is no past, no future. There is only the infinite now.
description.display: 也许并没有过去，也没有未来。只有无尽的当下。

description.original: I have found you wanting.
description.display: 我认为你不够格。

description.original: Remember, you are blessed!
description.display: 记住，你可是逢凶化吉的人！

description.original: ... unlike some people.
description.display: ......可不像某些人啊。

description.original: I have seen all, and I have judged all.
description.display: 我已见万物，亦已审万物。

effects.description: Increases the chance of $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: Sometimes my visions are stronger. So much to do...
description.display: 有时候我的预言会更强烈。要做的事情太多了……

description.original: Sometimes my visions are longer. So much to see...
description.display: 有时候我的预言会更持久。要看的东西太多了……

effects.description: Sets Portent to last for 50 seconds

description.original: To know the future is a heavy burden, but I shall bear it.
description.display: 预知未来是一种沉重的负担，但我愿背负它。

description.original: I have at times plied my trade for simple coin.
description.display: 有时候，我也会为了几枚金币出卖我的技艺。

description.original: The blade been passed through many generations.
description.display: 这把剑已经传了很多代了。

description.original: Do you have a specific story you'd like me to tell?
description.display: 有没有具体哪个故事是你想我讲的？

description.original: The runes spell logic in elvish.
description.display: 用精灵语拼写的“逻辑”字样符咒。

description.original: I have forseen this moment.
description.display: 我已经预见到了这一刻。

description.original: It's really more of a journal of our travels at this stage.
description.display: 到了这个阶段，它更像是我们旅行的日志。

description.original: Oghma has blessed me with knowledge.
description.display: 欧格马赐予了我知识。

description.original: Is it a mace case, or a case mace? It is both.
description.display: 这是一个权杖盒子，还是盒子权杖呢？两者都有。

description.original: A millenium of knowledge resides within.
description.display: 其中蕴含着一千年的知识。

description.original: I will always remember flying through the forest together on a parliament of giant owls.
description.display: 我会永远记得一起骑着一群巨型猫头鹰飞越森林的情景。

description.original: I worry this between my fingers whenever I feel lost.
description.display: 每当我感到迷茫的时候，我就会把它放在手指间摇晃。

description.original: A piece of the centerstone from the Chondalwood, the ancestral home of Clan Monkeymouse.
description.display: 来自猴鼠族的祖籍琼达尔森林的一块中心石。

description.original: So long as you have a piece of home with you, you're always there. I hold this near my heart.
description.display: 只要你身上带着一样家乡的东西，你的家就一直都在。我把这个放在我心口的位置。

description.original: Griff keeps nipping at the string. It makes it quite scratchy.
description.display: 格里夫一直在咬绳子。弄得绳子很痒。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Time is a line, except when it's a circle.
description.display: 时间是一条线，除非它是一个圆。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: My family is complicated, but friendship is simple, isn't it?
description.display: 我的家庭很复杂，但友谊很简单，不是吗？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: This strings together the past and the future.
description.display: 这串起了过去和未来。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: The speech bubble says 'Rrrraarrrrr!'
description.display: 对话泡泡里写着：“吼吼吼吼！”

description.original: I was a T-Rex, Penelope was a Dire Wolf. It was a typical Tuesday.
description.display: 我那时是一只霸王龙，而佩内洛普是一头恐狼。那是一个典型的星期二。

name.display: 做工粗糙的霸王龙雕刻

description.original: Briv did his best on this one.
description.display: 这已经是布里夫最好的水平了。

description.original: Made of Netherese Steel, it takes up a 3x3 square.
description.display: 由耐瑟钢制成，占地面积3x3。

description.original: Someone MUST keep track of these adventures!
description.display: 总得有人把这些冒险经历记录下来！

description.original: This unbreakable pen is stronger than any sword.
description.display: 这支牢不可破的笔比任何刀剑都更有力。

description.original: When you have parents like mine, it pays to do more research.
description.display: 如果你的父母跟我的一样，那么多做些研究是值得的。

description.original: Knowledge is power.
description.display: 知识就是力量。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Elf Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a INT score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Alyndra Alexandria Garanahil Sarrbarand is known by many names: Lorekeeper of Rime Spiro, Kinscribe of Clan Monkeymouse, Daughter of Oblivion, Fate Changer, Knight of Wonder and Captivation...and apologetic offspring of Avren & Sofieus.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Alyndra is a support and control Champion whose powerful Portents amplify the damage of Champions through clever use of their ultimates. She boosts the damage of Champions next to her, and her owl companion Griff further increases the damage against enemies they deem as unworthy.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 艾琳朵拉-亚历山大-加拉纳希尔-萨尔巴兰德有很多名字：莱姆-斯皮罗的传说守护者、猴鼠氏族的金斯克、遗忘之女、命运改变者、奇迹与俘虏骑士......阿夫伦与索菲乌斯的后代。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 艾琳朵拉是一名支援与控制型勇士，她强大的“预兆”技能通过巧妙地利用勇士们的杀招来增强他们的伤害。她会提高与她相邻勇士的伤害，而她的猫头鹰伙伴格里夫会进一步提高对那些被他们认为不配的敌人的伤害。

original.name: Mind Spike
original.description: Alyndra spikes the mind of a random enemy, damaging them and slowing them by 50% for 3 seconds.
original.long_description: Alyndra reaches into the mind of a random enemy, dealing damage and slowing the enemy by 50% for 3 seconds.

display.name: 心灵尖刺
display.description: 艾琳朵拉刺激一名随机敌人的心灵，造成伤害并使其在 3 秒内减速 50%。
display.long_description: 艾琳朵拉进入一名随机敌人的内心，造成伤害并使其在 3 秒内减速 50%。

original.name: Portent
original.description: Alyndra buffs the damage and attack speed of the next two Champions to use their ultimate attacks.
original.long_description: Alyndra buffs the damage and attack speed of the next two Champions to use their ultimate attacks. If a Champion uses their ultimate again before the buff expires, the duration is refreshed.

display.description: 艾琳朵拉会提高接下来两位使用杀招的勇士的伤害与攻击速度。
display.long_description: 艾琳朵拉会提高接下来两位使用杀招的勇士的伤害与攻击速度。如果勇士在增益消失之前再次使用杀招，则持续时间刷新。

display.description: 有时候我的预言会更持久。要看的东西太多了……

original.name: Heavy Lifter
original.description: To know the future is a heavy burden, but I shall bear it.

display.name: 中流砥柱
display.description: 预知未来是一种沉重的负担，但我愿背负它。

original.name: Entertainer
original.description: I have at times plied my trade for simple coin.

display.name: 艺人
display.description: 有时候，我也会为了几枚金币出卖我的技艺。

original.name: Ancient Longsword
original.description: The blade been passed through many generations.

display.name: 远古长剑
display.description: 这把剑已经传了很多代了。

original.name: Elven Blade
original.description: Do you have a specific story you'd like me to tell?

display.name: 精灵之刃
display.description: 有没有具体哪个故事是你想我讲的？

original.name: Logic
original.description: The runes spell logic in elvish.

display.name: 逻辑
display.description: 用精灵语拼写的“逻辑”字样符咒。

original.name: Blade of Infinite Possibilities
original.description: I have forseen this moment.

display.name: 无限可能之刃
display.description: 我已经预见到了这一刻。

original.name: Backup Spellbook
original.description: It's really more of a journal of our travels at this stage.

display.name: 备用魔法书
display.description: 到了这个阶段，它更像是我们旅行的日志。

original.name: Spellbook
original.description: Oghma has blessed me with knowledge.

display.name: 魔法书
display.description: 欧格马赐予了我知识。

original.name: Reason
original.description: Is it a mace case, or a case mace? It is both.

display.name: 原因
display.description: 这是一个权杖盒子，还是盒子权杖呢？两者都有。

original.name: A Reasonable Conclusion
original.description: A millenium of knowledge resides within.

display.name: 一个合理的结论
display.description: 其中蕴含着一千年的知识。

original.name: Memory Stone
original.description: I will always remember flying through the forest together on a parliament of giant owls.

display.name: 记忆石
display.description: 我会永远记得一起骑着一群巨型猫头鹰飞越森林的情景。

original.name: Sardonyx Stone
original.description: I worry this between my fingers whenever I feel lost.

display.name: 红玛瑙石
display.description: 每当我感到迷茫的时候，我就会把它放在手指间摇晃。

original.name: Home Stone
original.description: A piece of the centerstone from the Chondalwood, the ancestral home of Clan Monkeymouse.

display.name: 家乡的石头
display.description: 来自猴鼠族的祖籍琼达尔森林的一块中心石。

original.name: Stone of Clan Monkeymouse
original.description: So long as you have a piece of home with you, you're always there. I hold this near my heart.

display.name: 猴鼠族之石
display.description: 只要你身上带着一样家乡的东西，你的家就一直都在。我把这个放在我心口的位置。

original.name: Rough Necklace
original.description: Griff keeps nipping at the string. It makes it quite scratchy.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 粗糙项链
display.description: 格里夫一直在咬绳子。弄得绳子很痒。

effects.description: 使艾琳朵拉的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Ouroboros Charm
original.description: Time is a line, except when it's a circle.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 大蛇吊饰
display.description: 时间是一条线，除非它是一个圆。

effects.description: 使艾琳朵拉的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Tokens of Identity
original.description: My family is complicated, but friendship is simple, isn't it?

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 身份象征
display.description: 我的家庭很复杂，但友谊很简单，不是吗？

effects.description: 使艾琳朵拉的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Alyndra's Talismans of Time
original.description: This strings together the past and the future.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Alyndra's Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 艾琳朵拉的时间护符
display.description: 这串起了过去和未来。

effects.description: 使艾琳朵拉的专精效果提高 $(amount)%

original.name: Penelope's T-Rex
original.description: The speech bubble says 'Rrrraarrrrr!'

display.name: 佩内洛普的霸王龙
display.description: 对话泡泡里写着：“吼吼吼吼！”

original.name: A Moment in History
original.description: I was a T-Rex, Penelope was a Dire Wolf. It was a typical Tuesday.

display.name: 历史上的一刻
display.description: 我那时是一只霸王龙，而佩内洛普是一头恐狼。那是一个典型的星期二。

original.name: Rough Carving of a T-Rex
original.description: Briv did his best on this one.

display.name: 做工粗糙的霸王龙雕刻
display.description: 这已经是布里夫最好的水平了。

original.name: T-Rex Miniature Figurine
original.description: Made of Netherese Steel, it takes up a 3x3 square.

display.name: 霸王龙迷你小雕像
display.description: 由耐瑟钢制成，占地面积3x3。

original.name: Ink & Quill
original.description: Someone MUST keep track of these adventures!

display.name: 墨水和羽毛笔
display.description: 总得有人把这些冒险经历记录下来！

original.name: Pen of Oghma
original.description: This unbreakable pen is stronger than any sword.

display.name: 欧格马之笔
display.description: 这支牢不可破的笔比任何刀剑都更有力。

original.name: Lorekeeper's Tome
original.description: When you have parents like mine, it pays to do more research.

display.name: 知识守护者的巨著
display.description: 如果你的父母跟我的一样，那么多做些研究是值得的。

original.name: Symbol of Oghma
original.description: Knowledge is power.

display.name: 欧格马的象征
display.description: 知识就是力量。
